sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37330" key="e)ch/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξήνιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἡνία</etym>) <sense id="n37330.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unbridled, uncontrollable,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.510e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
